# MLOps Deployment Report: {{MODEL_NAME}}

**Generated by**: Linh (MLOps)
**Date**: 2026-03-19
**Model**: {{MODEL_NAME}} (Recommendation Model v2.3)
**Phase**: 5-specialized

---

## Executive Summary

Successfully deployed **{{MODEL_NAME}} v2.3** (XGBoost-based recommendation model) to production serving infrastructure. Model passed all validation gates with 8% improvement in CTR prediction accuracy over v2.1. A/B test traffic split: 10% → 30% over 2 weeks.

| Gate | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Model Quality | PASS | AUC: 0.847 (+3.2% vs baseline) |
| Data Drift Detection | PASS | PSI < 0.1 on all features |
| Infrastructure | PASS | GPU instances provisioned, latency < 50ms p95 |
| Monitoring | PASS | 12 dashboards, 8 alert rules configured |
| Rollback | PASS | Canary rollback tested in staging |

---

## Step 01: Model Validation

### Model Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Model Type | XGBoost Classifier (Gradient Boosted Trees) |
| Version | v2.3 |
| Training Date | 2026-03-15 |
| Training Data | 45M rows, features: user_behavior_7d, item_features, context_24h |
| Feature Count | 127 |
| Model Size | 340 MB (ONNX format) |
| Training AUC | 0.852 |
| Validation AUC | 0.847 |

### Performance Metrics vs Previous Version

| Metric | v2.1 (Prod) | v2.3 (New) | Delta |
|--------|-------------|------------|-------|
| AUC-ROC | 0.820 | 0.847 | +3.2% |
| Precision@10 | 0.312 | 0.338 | +8.3% |
| Recall@10 | 0.287 | 0.305 | +6.2% |
| CTR Prediction MAE | 0.048 | 0.041 | -14.6% |
| Inference Latency p95 | 38ms | 42ms | +4ms |
| Throughput | 12K req/s | 11K req/s | -8% |

**Decision**: Latency increase acceptable (< 50ms SLA). Throughput decrease managed via horizontal scaling.

### Data Drift Analysis

**PSI (Population Stability Index)** per feature group:

| Feature Group | PSI | Status |
|---------------|-----|--------|
| user_demographics | 0.02 | PASS (< 0.1) |
| user_behavior_7d | 0.05 | PASS (< 0.1) |
| item_metadata | 0.03 | PASS (< 0.1) |
| temporal_context | 0.08 | PASS (< 0.1) |
| interaction_features | 0.06 | PASS (< 0.1) |

**Conclusion**: No significant data drift detected. PSI < 0.1 across all feature groups — model is safe to deploy.

### A/B Test Plan

| Variant | Traffic % | Hypothesis | Primary Metric |
|---------|-----------|------------|----------------|
| Control (v2.1) | 90% | Baseline | CTR rate |
| Treatment (v2.3) | 10% | +5% CTR improvement | CTR rate |

**Progression**: 10% → 30% → 50% → 100% (if statistical significance p < 0.05, MDE +3%)

---

## Step 02: Deployment

### Serving Infrastructure

**Architecture**:

```
                    [API Gateway]
                    Load Balancer
                        │
        ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
        │               │               │
    [Pod: v2.1]  [Pod: v2.3]  [Pod: v2.3]
     (canary)    (canary)     (canary)
        │           │           │
        └───────────┴───────────┘
                    │
              [Feature Store]
              (Redis + PostgreSQL)
                    │
              [Model Registry]
              (MLflow + S3)
```

**Compute Resources**:

| Resource | Specification |
|----------|---------------|
| Instance Type | AWS g4dn.xlarge (NVIDIA T4 GPU) |
| Replicas | 3 (auto-scaling: 2-10 based on CPU/memory) |
| Memory | 16 GB |
| GPU Memory | 16 GB |
| Max Batch Size | 512 requests |
| Concurrency | 200 concurrent requests |

### Deployment Configuration

```yaml
# Kubernetes deployment (canary 10%)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{MODEL_NAME}}-v2.3
  labels:
    app: {{MODEL_NAME}}
    version: "2.3"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{MODEL_NAME}}
      version: "2.3"
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{MODEL_NAME}}
        version: "2.3"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: model-server
          image: 123456.dkr.ecr.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/{{MODEL_NAME}}:v2.3
          resources:
            limits:
              gpu: "1"
              memory: "16Gi"
              cpu: "4"
            requests:
              gpu: "1"
              memory: "8Gi"
              cpu: "2"
          env:
            - name: MODEL_PATH
              value: "/models/{{MODEL_NAME}}-v2.3.onnx"
            - name: MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI
              value: "http://mlflow.internal:5000"
```

### Rollback Strategy

- Canary: 10% traffic on v2.3, 90% on v2.1
- Canary period: 48 hours with monitoring
- Auto-rollback triggers: error rate > 1%, latency p95 > 100ms, AUC drop > 5%
- Manual rollback: single kubectl command (30 seconds)

---

## Step 03: Monitoring & Post-Deployment

### Monitoring Dashboards

**Grafana Dashboard**: `{{MODEL_NAME}}-v2.3 Overview`

| Panel | Metric | Alert Threshold |
|-------|--------|-----------------|
| Request Rate | requests_total / min | < 100 (under-traffic) |
| Latency p50 | model_inference_duration_seconds{quantile="0.5"} | > 30ms |
| Latency p95 | model_inference_duration_seconds{quantile="0.95"} | > 50ms |
| Error Rate | prediction_errors_total / requests_total | > 0.5% |
| GPU Utilization | gpu_utilization_percent | < 20% (under-utilized) |
| Feature Drift | psi_score (custom) | > 0.1 |
| Model Accuracy | ctr_prediction_error | > 5% drift from baseline |

### Alert Rules

```yaml
# Prometheus alert rules
groups:
  - name: {{MODEL_NAME}}-alerts
    rules:
      - alert: ModelLatencyHigh
        expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(model_inference_seconds_bucket[5m])) > 0.05
        for: 5m
        labels: { severity: warning }
        annotations:
          summary: "Model inference p95 > 50ms"

      - alert: DataDriftDetected
        expr: psi_score > 0.1
        for: 10m
        labels: { severity: critical }
        annotations:
          summary: "Feature drift detected — review model freshness"

      - alert: ModelAccuracyDegradation
        expr: abs(ctr_prediction_error - baseline_error) > 0.05
        for: 30m
        labels: { severity: critical }
        annotations:
          summary: "Model accuracy has drifted beyond threshold"
```

### MLflow Integration

- **Model Registry**: `s3://ml-models/{{MODEL_NAME}}/v2.3/`
- **Experiment Tracking**: MLflow experiment `{{MODEL_NAME}}-production`
- **Current Stage**: Production (10% traffic)
- **Metrics Logged**: hourly AUC, PSI, prediction distribution

### Post-Deployment Actions

| Action | Owner | Schedule |
|--------|-------|----------|
| Check A/B test metrics | Linh (MLOps) | Daily |
| Review feature drift dashboard | Data Team | Weekly |
| Evaluate full traffic promotion | Linh + Data Lead | After 2 weeks |
| Schedule retraining trigger | Linh | When PSI > 0.1 or AUC drops 3% |
